description: Scoring configuration for KPI categories, status weights, ROG thresholds, and role-based weights.
formula: Individual: category_score = sum(role_weight x status_credit) / sum(role_weight) x weightage using status credits Green=1.0, Orange=0.75, Red=0.0 and role weights Primary=20.0, Secondary=10.0, All=5.0, Common=3.0, Other=1.0. Team/Scrum use role weights specific=20.0 and non_specific=5.0. Overall = sum of category scores (max 100).
notes: Category weightages define importance of each KPI category (must sum to 100%)
Status weights define credit given for each performance level (Green=full, Orange=partial, Red=none)
Role weights for individual scores: Primary=20, Secondary=10, All=5, Common=3, Other/Metric=1
Aggregation role weights for team/scrum: role-specific KPIs=10, All/Common KPIs=5
ROG thresholds define performance percentage boundaries for individual KPI status determination
Score display thresholds define color coding for overall and category score gauges (0-35 Red, 36-70 Orange, 71-100 Green)
Only applicable KPIs for the role/team/scrum are included in scoring
Empty categories contribute 0 to the overall score
